care.light_guide: NC State: Full sun (6 or more hours of direct sunlight a day)

description: The fruit is a bright, light to dark blue berry that is poisonous.

care.light_guide: NC State: Dappled Sunlight (Shade through upper canopy all day)

description: Each flower is followed by a single, amethyst-blue berry.

care.light_guide: NC State: Deep shade (Less than 2 hours to no direct sunlight)

description: Lilium martagon, the martagon lily or Turk's cap lily, is a Eurasian species of lily. It has a widespread native region extending from Portugal east through Europe and Asia as far east as Mongolia.
